message:
fix(shims): add missing virtual module exports for community extensions (bd-2ru2)

Added to @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent:
- keyHint() - returns keyboard shortcut hint strings
- compact() - stub for conversation compaction

Added to @mariozechner/pi-ai:
- completeSimple() - stub for simple LLM completion

Added to @mariozechner/pi-tui:
- fuzzyMatch() - fuzzy string matching
- fuzzyFilter() - filter arrays using fuzzy matching
- getEditorKeybindings() - returns editor keybinding config

Added new virtual modules:
- node:readline - stub for interactive prompts
- node:url - URL parsing and file URL conversion
- node:net - stub (throws errors for socket operations)

Enhanced existing modules:
- node:fs: added realpathSync, promises object, mkdirSync
- node:os: added hostname, platform, arch, type, release

Community extension pass rate: 60% -> 90% (27/30)
Remaining 3 failures are platform-specific (native modules) or require
external packages (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
